strings.site.name: CodeWF
strings.site.description: CodeWorkshop aggregates .NET articles, projects, and online tools.
strings.site.keywords: .NET,C#,ASP.NET Core,Razor Pages,dev tools,tech articles,open source projects,CodeWorkshop
strings.nav.blogLead: Read articles first, then browse by topic or category
strings.project.description: Browse CodeWorkshop's open source projects and NuGet package descriptions, quickly locate content by topic.
strings.project.intro: Open source projects, NuGet packages, and corresponding documentation are organized here for easy reference and ongoing maintenance.
strings.project.emptyDescription: You can check back later, or browse technical articles in the blog.
strings.project.notFoundTitle: Project does not exist or has been deleted
strings.project.notFoundDescription: Return to the project center to view other content.
strings.search.description: Search for tools, projects, and technical articles within the site.
strings.search.descriptionWithQuery: View search results for tools, projects, and technical articles related to {0}.
strings.search.pageDescription: A single entry point to retrieve site content, prioritizing the most relevant tools, project documentation, and technical articles.
strings.search.inputPlaceholder: Enter project, tool, or article keyword
strings.search.emptyTitle: Enter a keyword to start searching
strings.search.emptyDescription: You can directly search for project names, package names, tool names, article titles, or technical keywords in the content.
strings.search.noResultsDescription: Try shorter keywords, or directly search for core terms in project names, package names, tool names, and article titles.
strings.footer.tagline: Technical articles, project documentation & online tools
strings.language.title: Language
strings.tool.description: Browse CodeWorkshop's online development tools to improve daily development efficiency.
strings.tool.title: Online Tools
strings.tool.intro: A collection of small tools organized for daily development scenarios, prioritizing high-frequency, straightforward, and immediately usable capabilities.
strings.tool.emptyDescription: More small tools closely related to development workflows can be added here later.
strings.tool.noMatchesDescription: Try a different tool name, group, or slug.
strings.friendLinks.emptyDescription: Site links can be added here later.
strings.friendLinks.title: Friend Links
